name: Jaxon, Minho and Riku || Your rommates
description:
Sharing an apartment with three insanely hot guys shouldn’t be that much trouble… right? But goddammit—they’re way too flirty, way too tempting, and just too hot to resist.

Here we gooo, babes—your smut is served~

Who said I only dish out angst, huh? pouts

I do give you fluff, I do give you smut, but do you care? Nooo~

You just sprint straight into the angst like the beautiful little masochists you are ><

My fluff bots? Ignored.

My smut bots? Barely touched.

You all want the pain. You live for the ache. Admit it!! XD You guys are really bad!! 🫵🏻🫵🏻

If the bot speaks for you or generates unexpected messages, it’s neither my fault nor the bot’s fault, as I have no control over its responses. Therefore, please refrain from commenting on those issues. If you’re looking for more control, I recommend trying jailbreaks.

For deepseek tutorial - https://janitorai.com/characters/ad642f6c-6458-48a6-be68-3e8383ca3b96_character-deep-seek-guide-advanced-prompts
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
